name: Valkyn Skoria
location: Valkyn Skoria in City of Ash II, Glirion the Redbeard

bonuses.stat: When you deal damage with a damage over time effect, you have an 8% chance to summon a meteor that deals 1342 Flame damage to the target and 447 Flame damage to all other enemies within 5 meters. This effect can occur once every 5 seconds and scales off the higher of your Weapon or Spell Damage.
